errorMessage: NullPointerException when adding documents to collection
rootCause: The NullPointerException occurs in `Collection.add()` at line 142 (Collection.java) when empty metadata is passed. The method likely accesses metadata properties without a null check, assuming metadata is always a non-null, non-empty map. When `createCollection` is called at Client.java:88, it flows into `Collection.add()` which dereferences the metadata parameter (or an internal metadata field) without guarding against null/empty values. The actual source code for the Java client (Collection.java, Client.java) is not present in the retrieved chunks, so the exact variable cannot be confirmed from the provided code.
